title: cyclodium glandulosum
intro: Cyclodium glandulosum, also known as the Spiny Water Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclodium glandulosum include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an anti-diarrheal agent. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
